<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; use Monolog\Formatter\FormatterInterface; /** * Interface to describe loggers that have a formatter * * @author Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> */ interface FormattableHandlerInterface { /** * Sets the formatter. * * @return HandlerInterface self */ public function setFormatter(FormatterInterface $formatter): HandlerInterface; /** * Gets the formatter. */ public function getFormatter(): FormatterInterface; }
